---
title: "Predicting irAE with Olink serum proteins"
author: "Tiangen Chang"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Predicting irAE with Olink serum proteins}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

####### This script makes the below displays for the paper
## Figure 4c-e,g

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, results = "markup", warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Package Loading
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(pROC)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

```


# parameters and constants and common functions
```{r}
result_figure_dir <- "Figures"
data_dir <- "SourceData"

fig_path <- function(file) file.path(result_figure_dir, file)
data_path <- function(file) file.path(data_dir, file)

```


# Load data
```{r}
HCI002_all_info <- readr::read_csv(data_path("HCI002_all_info.csv"), name_repair = "minimal")
HCI002_map_df <- read.csv(data_path("HCI002_OlinkID_ProteinName_map.csv"))
```


# Figure 4c. Heatmap (of Olink protein fold-change).
```{r}
map_olink_features <- function(feature_df, time_point, map_df) {
  olink_df <- feature_df[grepl(paste0("OLINK_", time_point), colnames(feature_df))]
  colnames(olink_df) <- gsub(paste0("_OLINK_", time_point), "", colnames(olink_df))

  protein_names <- map_df$Assay[match(colnames(olink_df), map_df$OlinkID)]
  colnames(olink_df) <- protein_names
  olink_df[, !duplicated(colnames(olink_df)), drop = FALSE]
}

rank_features_by_group_fc <- function(expr_mat, group_vec, case_level) {
  case_idx <- which(group_vec == case_level)
  control_idx <- which(group_vec != case_level)

  fc_df <- data.frame(
    Gene = rownames(expr_mat),
    log2_FC = apply(expr_mat, 1, function(x) {
      log2(median(x[case_idx], na.rm = TRUE) / median(x[control_idx], na.rm = TRUE))
    })
  )

  fc_df$Gene[order(fc_df$log2_FC, decreasing = TRUE)]
}

irAE_vec <- HCI002_all_info$IRAEactionable01
irAE_grade_vec <- HCI002_all_info$`irAE Overall Assessment`
ICBR_vec <- HCI002_all_info$Response01
sex_vec <- HCI002_all_info$Gender
IPIdrug_vec <- HCI002_all_info$Drug

genes_show <- c(
  "CXCL9", "CXCL10", "CXCL11", "IFNG", "CXCL13", "IL17A", "IL10", "IL12A",
  "IL21", "B4GALT1", "CD276", "CD70", "FLT3LG", "FSTL3", "IL2RB", "KRT19",
  "PGF", "CA6"
)

HCI002_feature_df <- HCI002_all_info[61:25932]
HCI002_OLINK_FC_on_pre_df <- map_olink_features(HCI002_feature_df, "FC_on_pre", HCI002_map_df)

expr_mat <- apply(HCI002_OLINK_FC_on_pre_df, 2, as.numeric)
rownames(expr_mat) <- rownames(HCI002_OLINK_FC_on_pre_df)
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, apply(expr_mat, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, drop = FALSE]

valid_samples <- rowSums(is.na(expr_mat)) < 0.2 * ncol(expr_mat) & !is.na(irAE_vec)
expr_mat <- expr_mat[valid_samples, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, colSums(!is.na(expr_mat)) > 0, drop = FALSE]

annotation_df <- data.frame(
  `irAE grade` = factor(irAE_grade_vec[valid_samples], levels = c("Severe", "Moderate", "Mild", "None")),
  Response = factor(ICBR_vec[valid_samples], levels = c(0, 1)),
  Sex = factor(sex_vec[valid_samples], levels = c("Female", "Male")),
  Treatment = factor(IPIdrug_vec[valid_samples], levels = c("PD1/PDL1", "CTLA4-containing")),
  check.names = FALSE
)
rownames(annotation_df) <- rownames(expr_mat)

expr_row_means <- rowMeans(expr_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
severe_idx <- annotation_df$`irAE grade` == "Severe"
ordered_idx <- c(
  which(severe_idx)[order(expr_row_means[severe_idx], decreasing = TRUE)],
  which(!severe_idx)[order(expr_row_means[!severe_idx], decreasing = TRUE)]
)

expr_mat <- expr_mat[ordered_idx, , drop = FALSE]
annotation_df <- annotation_df[ordered_idx, , drop = FALSE]

column_split_vec <- factor(
  ifelse(annotation_df$`irAE grade` == "Severe", "Severe irAE", "Non-severe irAE"),
  levels = c("Severe irAE", "Non-severe irAE")
)

annotation_colors <- list(
  `irAE grade` = c(Severe = "#D73027", Moderate = "#FC8D59", Mild = "#FEE08B", None = "#D9EF8B"),
  Response = c("0" = "#91BFDB", "1" = "#4575B4"),
  Sex = c(Female = "#E78AC3", Male = "#00BFC4"),
  Treatment = c("PD1/PDL1" = "#A6CEE3", "CTLA4-containing" = "#1F78B4")
)

top_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = annotation_df,
  col = annotation_colors,
  annotation_legend_param = list(title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
)

expr_mat_ordered <- t(expr_mat)
ranked_genes <- rank_features_by_group_fc(expr_mat_ordered, annotation_df$`irAE grade`, "Severe")
expr_mat_ordered <- expr_mat_ordered[ranked_genes, , drop = FALSE]
expr_scaled_ordered <- log2(expr_mat_ordered)

label_rows <- which(rownames(expr_scaled_ordered) %in% genes_show)
gene_mark_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  Gene = anno_mark(
    at = label_rows,
    labels = rownames(expr_scaled_ordered)[label_rows],
    side = "right",
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    link_width = unit(1, "mm")
  )
)

quantile5 <- quantile(expr_scaled_ordered, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)[[1]]
quantile95 <- quantile(expr_scaled_ordered, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)[[1]]
expr_scaled_ordered_capped <- pmin(pmax(expr_scaled_ordered, quantile5), quantile95)

ht <- Heatmap(
  matrix = expr_scaled_ordered_capped,
  name = "Log2 (FC)",
  use_raster = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = FALSE,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  column_split = column_split_vec,
  col = colorRamp2(c(quantile5, 0, quantile95), c("blue", "white", "red")),
  top_annotation = top_anno,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Log2 (FC)",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    legend_direction = "horizontal",
    legend_width = unit(4, "cm"),
    title_position = "topcenter"
  )
) + gene_mark_anno

pdf(fig_path("HCI002_OLINK_FC_heatmap.pdf"), width = 7.2, height = 9.9, useDingbats = FALSE)
draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "bottom",
  annotation_legend_side = "bottom",
  padding = unit(c(0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4), "cm")
)
dev.off()

```

# Figure 4g. Heatmap (of AUCs).
```{r}
timePt_test <- "FC_on_pre"
sheet_names <- c("IRAE_GI01", "IRAE_HB01", "IRAE_skin01", "IRAE_MSK01", "IRAEactionable01")
file_path <- data_path("HCI002_AUCs_allPhenotypes.xlsx")

read_auc_sheet <- function(sheet_name, time_point) {
  data_raw <- as.data.frame(read_excel(file_path, sheet = sheet_name))
  data_filtered <- data_raw[grepl(paste0("OLINK_", time_point, "$"), data_raw[[1]]), 1:3]
  colnames(data_filtered) <- c("Protein", paste0("AUC_", sheet_name), paste0("p_", sheet_name))
  data_filtered
}

result_df <- Reduce(
  function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Protein", all = TRUE),
  lapply(sheet_names, read_auc_sheet, time_point = timePt_test)
)

proteins_mapping <- setNames(HCI002_map_df$Assay, HCI002_map_df$OlinkID)

result_df$Protein <- gsub(paste0("_OLINK_", timePt_test), "", result_df$Protein)
result_df$ProteinName <- proteins_mapping[result_df$Protein]
result_df <- result_df[!duplicated(result_df$ProteinName), ]

auc_cols <- paste0("AUC_", sheet_names)
p_cols <- paste0("p_", sheet_names)

result_df$irAE_AUC_mean <- rowMeans(result_df[auc_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
result_df <- result_df[order(result_df$irAE_AUC_mean, decreasing = TRUE), ]

genes_show <- c(
  "CXCL9", "CXCL10", "CXCL11", "IFNG", "CXCL13", "IL17A", "IL10", "IL12A",
  "IL21", "B4GALT1", "CD276", "CD70", "FLT3LG", "FSTL3", "IL2RB", "KRT19",
  "PGF", "CA6", "MIA", "PDCD1", "HLA-DRA"
)

plot_df <- result_df[result_df$ProteinName %in% genes_show, c(auc_cols, p_cols, "ProteinName")]

AUC_matrix <- as.matrix(plot_df[auc_cols])
rownames(AUC_matrix) <- plot_df$ProteinName

p_matrix <- as.matrix(plot_df[p_cols])
rownames(p_matrix) <- plot_df$ProteinName

ordered_proteins <- names(sort(rowMeans(AUC_matrix, na.rm = TRUE), decreasing = TRUE))
AUC_matrix <- t(AUC_matrix[ordered_proteins, , drop = FALSE])
p_matrix <- t(p_matrix[ordered_proteins, , drop = FALSE])
p_matrix <- apply(p_matrix, c(1, 2), as.numeric)

row_labels <- c(
  AUC_IRAE_GI01 = "Gastrointestinal",
  AUC_IRAE_HB01 = "Hepatobiliary",
  AUC_IRAE_skin01 = "Skin",
  AUC_IRAE_MSK01 = "Musculoskeletal",
  AUC_IRAEactionable01 = "Overall"
)

rownames(AUC_matrix) <- row_labels[rownames(AUC_matrix)]

heatmap <- Heatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  name = "AUC",
  col = colorRamp2(
    c(min(AUC_matrix, na.rm = TRUE), 0.5, max(AUC_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)),
    c("blue", "white", "red")
  ),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_side = "left",
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  border = TRUE,
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    if (!is.na(p_matrix[i, j]) && p_matrix[i, j] < 0.05) {
      grid.text("*", x = x, y = y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 12))
    }
  }
)

pdf(fig_path("Heatmap_HCI002_AUC_pvalue_OLINK_vs_different_irAEs.pdf"), height = 3, width = 7)
draw(heatmap)
dev.off()

```

# Figure 4d. AUC comparison of selected Olink proteins across time points in HCI002
```{r}
proteins_test <- c("CXCL9", "CA6")
timepoints <- c("baseline", "ontreat", "FC_on_pre")

protein_map <- setNames(HCI002_map_df$Assay, HCI002_map_df$OlinkID)
selected_olink_ids <- HCI002_map_df$OlinkID[HCI002_map_df$Assay %in% proteins_test]

feature_cols <- colnames(HCI002_all_info)[
  grepl(paste(selected_olink_ids, collapse = "|"), colnames(HCI002_all_info)) &
    grepl(paste(timepoints, collapse = "|"), colnames(HCI002_all_info))
]

HCI002_feature_df <- HCI002_all_info[, feature_cols, drop = FALSE]
colnames(HCI002_feature_df) <- gsub("_OLINK", "", colnames(HCI002_feature_df))

for (olink_id in names(protein_map)) {
  colnames(HCI002_feature_df) <- gsub(olink_id, protein_map[[olink_id]], colnames(HCI002_feature_df))
}

compute_auc <- function(df, feature_col, outcome_col = "IRAEactionable01") {
  auc_df <- df %>%
    select(outcome = all_of(outcome_col), predictor = all_of(feature_col)) %>%
    drop_na()

  if (nrow(auc_df) < 5 || length(unique(auc_df$outcome)) < 2) {
    return(data.frame(
      Feature = feature_col,
      AUC = NA,
      AUC_low = NA,
      AUC_up = NA,
      P_value = NA
    ))
  }

  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
    auc_df$outcome,
    auc_df$predictor,
    direction = "<",
    levels = c(0, 1),
    quiet = TRUE
  )

  auc_ci <- pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj)

  null_roc <- pROC::roc(
    auc_df$outcome,
    rep(0.5, nrow(auc_df)),
    levels = c(0, 1),
    quiet = TRUE
  )

  p_value <- suppressMessages(
    pROC::roc.test(roc_obj, null_roc, method = "delong")$p.value
  )

  data.frame(
    Feature = feature_col,
    AUC = as.numeric(auc_ci[2]),
    AUC_low = as.numeric(auc_ci[1]),
    AUC_up = as.numeric(auc_ci[3]),
    P_value = p_value
  )
}

auc_input <- cbind(
  HCI002_feature_df,
  IRAEactionable01 = HCI002_all_info$IRAEactionable01
)

result_df <- bind_rows(lapply(colnames(HCI002_feature_df), function(feature_col) {
  compute_auc(auc_input, feature_col)
}))

plot_df <- result_df %>%
  mutate(
    Protein = case_when(
      grepl("CXCL9", Feature) ~ "CXCL9",
      grepl("CA6", Feature) ~ "CA6",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Timepoint = case_when(
      grepl("baseline", Feature) ~ "Pre-treatment",
      grepl("ontreat", Feature) ~ "On-treatment",
      grepl("FC_on_pre", Feature) ~ "Fold-change",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Protein), !is.na(Timepoint)) %>%
  mutate(
    AUC_low_new = ifelse(AUC < 0.5, 1 - AUC_up, AUC_low),
    AUC_up_new = ifelse(AUC < 0.5, 1 - AUC_low, AUC_up),
    AUC = ifelse(AUC < 0.5, 1 - AUC, AUC),
    AUC_low = AUC_low_new,
    AUC_up = AUC_up_new,
    Protein = factor(Protein, levels = proteins_test),
    Timepoint = factor(
      Timepoint,
      levels = c("Pre-treatment", "On-treatment", "Fold-change")
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-AUC_low_new, -AUC_up_new)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = AUC, fill = Protein)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = AUC_low, ymax = AUC_up),
    width = 0.2,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.5,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.5,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    CXCL9 = "#1B9E77",
    CA6 = "#D95F02"
  )) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUC") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.8)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

pdf(
  fig_path("barplot_AUC_compare_CXCL9_CA6_timePts_HCI002.pdf"),
  onefile = FALSE,
  width = 2.2,
  height = 3
)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

# Figure 4e. Severe-irAE-free survival by CXCL9 fold-change in HCI002
```{r}
feature_col <- "CXCL9_FC_on_pre"

predictor_df <- HCI002_all_info %>%
  select(`Vial ID`, patient_therapy) %>%
  bind_cols(HCI002_feature_df[, feature_col, drop = FALSE]) %>%
  mutate(uniqueID = paste0(patient_therapy, "_", `Vial ID`)) %>%
  distinct(uniqueID, .keep_all = TRUE)

survival_info_df <- readxl::read_excel(data_path("HCI002_clinical_info.xlsx")) %>%
  select(
    `Vial ID`,
    `Record ID`,
    `Systemic Therapy Name`,
    `Systemic Therapy Type`,
    Nonsevere_irAE_time,
    Nonsevere_irAE_event
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    uniqueID = paste0(
      `Record ID`, "_",
      `Systemic Therapy Name`, "_",
      `Systemic Therapy Type`, "_",
      `Vial ID`
    )
  )

survival_df <- merge(predictor_df, survival_info_df, by = "uniqueID", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[feature_col]])) %>%
  transmute(
    Score = factor(
      ifelse(.data[[feature_col]] > median(.data[[feature_col]], na.rm = TRUE), "High", "Low"),
      levels = c("Low", "High")
    ),
    time = as.numeric(Nonsevere_irAE_time) / 30,
    event = as.numeric(Nonsevere_irAE_event)
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

surv_fit <- survfit(Surv(time, event) ~ Score, data = survival_df)
cox_fit <- coxph(Surv(time, event) ~ Score, data = survival_df)
cox_summary <- summary(cox_fit)

hr <- cox_summary$coefficients[1, "exp(coef)"]
p_value <- cox_summary$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"]
hr_ci <- cox_summary$conf.int[1, c("lower .95", "upper .95")]

km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  surv_fit,
  data = survival_df,
  size = 1,
  palette = c("#00305d", "#9c1915"),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  pval = FALSE,
  xlim = c(-3, 70),
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Severe-irAE-free \nsurvival probability",
  break.time.by = 10,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  risk.table.pos = "out",
  risk.table.col = "black",
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  tables.y.text = FALSE,
  tables.theme = theme_cleantable(),
  legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend = c(0.75, 0.975),
  font.main = 12,
  font.caption = 12,
  font.legend = 12,
  font.tickslab = 12,
  font.x = 12,
  font.y = 12,
  ggtheme = theme(
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0.2, 0.2, 0, 0.2), "cm"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black")
  )
)

km_plot$plot <- km_plot$plot +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0,
    y = 0.15,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 5,
    label = paste0(
      "HR = ", round(hr, 2),
      " (", round(hr_ci[1], 2), "-", round(hr_ci[2], 2), ")",
      "\np = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    )
  )

pdf(fig_path(paste0("KM_curve_Nonsevere_irAE_FoldChange_", feature_col, ".pdf")), width = 3.3, height = 3)
print(km_plot, newpage = FALSE)
dev.off()
```
